sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47182" key="h(mimo/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-μόριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, sine expl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:160" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.160</biblScope> </bibl> (<sense id="n47182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-μοίριον</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
